title: HuggingFace Token
description: Bearer token for the HuggingFace Hub API.
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries a HuggingFace Hub bearer token between caps. The token is forwarded as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` to the HuggingFace API for the call's duration only — no implicit fallback to the `HF_TOKEN` environment variable, no global state.

## When to use
Use this media type for any cap argument that must reach gated HuggingFace repositories (license-protected models such as the `gemma-*` family). Caps that do not provide a token to a gated download fail hard with a clear authentication error.

## Notes
- The `secret` tag instructs UIs and logs to mask the value.
- An empty string is treated as "no token". Pass a non-empty string to authenticate.
